MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-25-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Orde3r Imposing Terminating Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Mark Mizrahi's Motion For Terminating And Monetary Sanctions is denied. Plaintiff's objections to the declaration of Karen Y. Uchiyama are overruled. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Set For Trial On Feb-19-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-30-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 604

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Compelling Interrogatory Compelling Interrogatory Responses And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kristina Werts, Esq., appearing for at the request of moving party. Mark Mizrahi
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Mark Mizrahi's Motion To Compel Interrogatory Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $525, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-20-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
